description: User clicks 'Open editor' button on the landing page
User creates a new canvas (from preset or custom dimensions)
User opens an existing file from the files grid
User duplicates a file via the file card menu
User downloads a file as JSON via the file card menu
User confirms deletion of one or more files
User downloads a PNG export of the canvas
User submits a prompt to the Magic AI panel
User renames the document title in the editor
User downloads multiple selected files at once
